title: hasFocus()
text: hasFocus() Returns true if the field's HTML input widget has focus. Return = Field. hasFocus () Arguments None Return value Returns true if the field has focus, or false if its does not. Description This function can only be used with HTML widgets in a Dynamic Server Page. Example: Using hasFocus In the following example, hasFocus is used to check whether the current field has focus. Explain this code ; at Field level webtrigger onchange scope input endscope javascript this.focus(); if (this.hasFocus()) { alert('Has the Focus'); } endjavascript end Copy Was this topic helpful?
